question: How much do exam vouchers cost?
answer: Our exam voucher prices vary depending on the exam type. BECE, WASSCE, and NOVDEC vouchers each have different pricing based on official exam requirements. Visit the pricing page or search for a specific voucher to see the exact cost.

question: How do I purchase an exam voucher?
answer: To purchase a voucher: (1) Select your exam type (BECE, WASSCE, or NOVDEC), (2) Add the voucher to your cart, (3) Proceed to checkout, (4) Complete payment via Mobile Money or other supported methods, (5) Your voucher code will be delivered instantly after payment.

question: Do vouchers expire?
answer: No, CivicTree vouchers never expire. You can use your voucher anytime, giving you complete flexibility to study and take your exam at your own pace

question: Can I get a refund on a voucher?
answer: Refunds are available only if the voucher has NOT been used or activated. Once a voucher has been redeemed or issued for an exam, it becomes non-refundable. Please contact support for assistance with refund requests.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
answer: We accept Mobile Money (MTN, Telecel, AirtelTigo), Visa cards, and Mastercard. All transactions are processed securely.

question: When will I receive my voucher?
answer: Vouchers are delivered instantly after successful payment. You will receive your voucher via SMS and/or email. If delivery is delayed, please check your spam folder or contact support.

question: Are there any discounts available?
answer: You can contact our support team for discount related inquiries via email or WhatsApp during working hours. We are available to assist with voucher issues, payments, and general inquiries.

question: Which exam vouchers are available on the platform?
answer: CivicTree currently supports three major Ghanaian exams: BECE (Basic Education Certificate Exam), WASSCE (West African Senior School Certificate Exam), and NOVDEC (National Office for Vocational Education and Training December Exam)

question: How do I use my voucher?
answer: Visit our website to follow the step-by-step guide on how use your voucher. Gnerally, you will log in to Ghana WEAC portal, select exam type and follow the instructions to check your results

question: How can I contact support?
answer: You can contact our support team via email or WhatsApp during working hours. We are available to assist with voucher issues, payments, and general inquiries.

question: Do I need an account to purchase?
answer: No!.  Account registration is not required to purchase vouchers. Use the USSD code or use the buy on the website to purchase your voucher.

question: Can I buy another voucher?
answer: Yes!, absolutely! You can buy another voucher at anytime. In multiple purchase too, during checkout, you can select any quantity from 1 to 20 vouchers in a single purchase. Perfect for schools or group purchases
